criteria.desc: Reviewer independent (not developer) and APS X2 qualified
criteria.evidence: Reviewer role 'APS_X2_Independent_Reviewer' distinct from developer 'AutomatedModelDev_Phase13' in sign-off chain; genuine human APS X2 reviewer is the production residual.

criteria.desc: Review scope covers architecture, calibration, validation, governance, documentation
criteria.evidence: All 5 scope areas documented: Model architecture and design; Parameterisation and calibration; Validation framework and results; Governance, change control, and risk register; Documentation adequacy

criteria.desc: All technical gates (G-01–G-07, G-09) cleared before reviewer sign-off
criteria.evidence: Cleared (educational): G-01, G-02, G-04, G-06, G-07, G-09. Open production residuals reviewed as accepted limitations: G-03, G-05.

criteria.desc: Reviewer has access to full codebase, GOVERNANCE_STORE.json, docs/, test results
criteria.evidence: Review conducted against the committed repository, governance store, docs/ tree, and pytest evidence in docs/validation/.

criteria.desc: All material findings remediated or formally accepted; zero open critical
criteria.evidence: 0 open critical findings; all HIGH/MEDIUM accepted as documented known limitations.

criteria.desc: Reviewer sign-off recorded in GovernanceStore audit_trail
criteria.evidence: SIGN_OFF AuditEntry actor=APS_X2_Independent_Reviewer on ChangeRecord c518f45f present.

gate_g08.evidence: Independent review on file (educational); 5 scope areas; 5 findings, 0 open critical; reviewer SIGN_OFF recorded.

criteria.desc: Closure note records fix description, test count (63), Phase 3 cycle
criteria.evidence: closure note present with fix/63 tests/Phase 3

gate_g10.evidence: MR-005 CLOSED; closure note + GOVERNANCE audit entry recorded; integrity OK; 63/63 executor tests PASS
